mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fire_contact WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_fire_contact WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_contact WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_contact (org_type, org_name, main_tel, emergency_tel, mgr_name, mgr_mobile, contract_period, coverage, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{orgType}, #{orgName}, #{mainTel}, #{emergencyTel}, #{mgrName}, #{mgrMobile}, #{contractPeriod}, #{coverage}, #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_contact SET org_type = #{orgType}, org_name = #{orgName}, main_tel = #{mainTel}, emergency_tel = #{emergencyTel}, mgr_name = #{mgrName}, mgr_mobile = #{mgrMobile}, contract_period = #{contractPeriod}, coverage = #{coverage}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_fire_contact SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
